TEXT.id: Wiki_Atayal_泰雅維基百科泰雅姓名學
TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: 泰雅維基百科泰雅姓名學
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: lalu likuy qu Hoku. smru moyay kakay hkangi nqu qara qhuniq.yasa son ta "hoku". ita tayal hiya ga,sswe balay mlikuy lahang ngasal ru blaq p'aras posa bnkis.sswe balay laqi ga stman balay na bnkis.yani yaqih gaya stama balay hoku ru.pcingan laqi likuy sllwan yaya yayba "Hoku". sinllwan naha lalu Hoku qani ga,kahul squ qalang M'rqwang ru bnkis na qutux naha niqan,swa naha sllwan maha Hoku qani ga,pucing balay na laqi mlikuy ru mosa baqun stama mnaga ni yaba kiy yaya ma,sraral hya ga maha ni baq mqyanux qu 'laqi cinngasal qani lga siqoris sa musa mtbuci mqyanux nanak kwara qu qbsuyan hya la,mosa nanak pyang cikuy na laqi qu msthay ngasal,nanu yasa qu imi na Hoku qani ga mosa blaq tun bnkis ru phaw miq squ qsya hlhun, ps'ru qnxan qutux ngasal.ana misuw qani ga baqun naha kwara qu sinllwan lalu na Hoku qani ppraw qnxan na bbnkis ma. Hoku maki qu Gaga na Tayal maha.Hoku qani ga pgleng maras rmaw inlungan nqu bnkis,yan nqu musa cinblihun smyey ga siki s'aras naha hoku,hoku qani ga siki maybnkis ru mr'ru qu inlungan nya giwan nqu pgleng kmayal zywaw na musa smyey ru pquziy squ tokan te syaw blihun teta baqun kwara ka qalang maha nyux rima wahan smyey ni squliq qu laqi kneril cinngasal qani lma. nyux galan hoku ni yutas qu Hoku qani gi hya qu p'aras lmosay. 阿公把Hoku當他的拐杖帶上帶下. siki maras ta hoku musa ta mklhngan mhkangi ay! gi ssagaw ta mqu. !
S.PHON: lalu likuj qu ħoku. s~ɕmru mojaj kakaj ħkaŋi nqu qara qħuniq.jas~ɕa s~ɕon ta "ħoku". ita tajal ħija ɣa,s~ɕs~ɕwe βalaj mlikuj laħaŋ ŋas~ɕal ru βlaq pʔaras~ɕ pos~ɕa βnkis~ɕ.s~ɕs~ɕwe βalaj laqi ɣa s~ɕtman βalaj na βnkis~ɕ.jani jaqiħ ɣaja s~ɕtama βalaj ħoku ru.pʦ~ʨiŋan laqi likuj s~ɕllwan jaja jajβa "ħoku". s~ɕinllwan naħa lalu ħoku qani ɣa,kaħul s~ɕqu qalaŋ mʔrqwaŋ ru βnkis~ɕ na qutux naħa niqan,s~ɕwa naħa s~ɕllwan maħa ħoku qani ɣa,puʦ~ʨiŋ βalaj na laqi mlikuj ru mos~ɕa βaqun s~ɕtama mnaɣa ni jaβa kij jaja ma,s~ɕraral ħja ɣa maħa ni βaq mqjanux qu ʔlaqi ʦ~ʨinŋas~ɕal qani lɣa s~ɕiqoris~ɕ s~ɕa mus~ɕa mtβuʦ~ʨi mqjanux nanak kwara qu qβs~ɕujan ħja la,mos~ɕa nanak pjaŋ ʦ~ʨikuj na laqi qu ms~ɕtħaj ŋas~ɕal,nanu jas~ɕa qu imi na ħoku qani ɣa mos~ɕa βlaq tun βnkis~ɕ ru pħaw miq s~ɕqu qs~ɕja ħlħun, ps~ɕʔru qnxan qutux ŋas~ɕal.ana mis~ɕuw qani ɣa βaqun naħa kwara qu s~ɕinllwan lalu na ħoku qani ppraw qnxan na ββnkis~ɕ ma. ħoku maki qu ɣaɣa na tajal maħa.ħoku qani ɣa pɣleŋ maras~ɕ rmaw inluŋan nqu βnkis~ɕ,jan nqu mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨinβliħun s~ɕmjej ɣa s~ɕiki s~ɕʔaras~ɕ naħa ħoku,ħoku qani ɣa s~ɕiki majβnkis~ɕ ru mrʔru qu inluŋan nja ɣiwan nqu pɣleŋ kmajal zjwaw na mus~ɕa s~ɕmjej ru pquzij s~ɕqu tokan te s~ɕjaw βliħun teta βaqun kwara ka qalaŋ maħa njux rima waħan s~ɕmjej ni s~ɕquliq qu laqi kneril ʦ~ʨinŋas~ɕal qani lma. njux ɣalan ħoku ni jutas~ɕ qu ħoku qani ɣi ħja qu pʔaras~ɕ lmos~ɕaj. ***ħoku*********. s~ɕiki maras~ɕ ta ħoku mus~ɕa ta mklħŋan mħkaŋi aj! ɣi s~ɕs~ɕaɣaw ta mqu. !
S.FORM: lalu likuy qu Hoku. smru moyay kakay hkangi nqu qara qhuniq.yasa son ta "hoku". ita tayal hiya ga,sswe balay mlikuy lahang ngasal ru blaq p'aras posa bnkis.sswe balay laqi ga stman balay na bnkis.yani yaqih gaya stama balay hoku ru.pcingan laqi likuy sllwan yaya yayba "Hoku". sinllwan naha lalu Hoku qani ga,kahul squ qalang M'rqwang ru bnkis na qutux naha niqan,swa naha sllwan maha Hoku qani ga,pucing balay na laqi mlikuy ru mosa baqun stama mnaga ni yaba kiy yaya ma,sraral hya ga maha ni baq mqyanux qu 'laqi cinngasal qani lga siqoris sa musa mtbuci mqyanux nanak kwara qu qbsuyan hya la,mosa nanak pyang cikuy na laqi qu msthay ngasal,nanu yasa qu imi na Hoku qani ga mosa blaq tun bnkis ru phaw miq squ qsya hlhun, ps'ru qnxan qutux ngasal.ana misuw qani ga baqun naha kwara qu sinllwan lalu na Hoku qani ppraw qnxan na bbnkis ma. Hoku maki qu Gaga na Tayal maha.Hoku qani ga pgleng maras rmaw inlungan nqu bnkis,yan nqu musa cinblihun smyey ga siki s'aras naha hoku,hoku qani ga siki maybnkis ru mr'ru qu inlungan nya giwan nqu pgleng kmayal zywaw na musa smyey ru pquziy squ tokan te syaw blihun teta baqun kwara ka qalang maha nyux rima wahan smyey ni squliq qu laqi kneril cinngasal qani lma. nyux galan hoku ni yutas qu Hoku qani gi hya qu p'aras lmosay. 阿公把Hoku當他的拐杖帶上帶下. siki maras ta hoku musa ta mklhngan mhkangi ay! gi ssagaw ta mqu. !
S.PHON: lalu likuj qu ħoku. s~ɕmru mojaj kakaj ħkaŋi nqu qara qħuniq.jas~ɕa s~ɕon ta "ħoku". ita tajal ħija ɣa,s~ɕs~ɕwe βalaj mlikuj laħaŋ ŋas~ɕal ru βlaq pʔaras~ɕ pos~ɕa βnkis~ɕ.s~ɕs~ɕwe βalaj laqi ɣa s~ɕtman βalaj na βnkis~ɕ.jani jaqiħ ɣaja s~ɕtama βalaj ħoku ru.pʦ~ʨiŋan laqi likuj s~ɕllwan jaja jajβa "ħoku". s~ɕinllwan naħa lalu ħoku qani ɣa,kaħul s~ɕqu qalaŋ mʔrqwaŋ ru βnkis~ɕ na qutux naħa niqan,s~ɕwa naħa s~ɕllwan maħa ħoku qani ɣa,puʦ~ʨiŋ βalaj na laqi mlikuj ru mos~ɕa βaqun s~ɕtama mnaɣa ni jaβa kij jaja ma,s~ɕraral ħja ɣa maħa ni βaq mqjanux qu ʔlaqi ʦ~ʨinŋas~ɕal qani lɣa s~ɕiqoris~ɕ s~ɕa mus~ɕa mtβuʦ~ʨi mqjanux nanak kwara qu qβs~ɕujan ħja la,mos~ɕa nanak pjaŋ ʦ~ʨikuj na laqi qu ms~ɕtħaj ŋas~ɕal,nanu jas~ɕa qu imi na ħoku qani ɣa mos~ɕa βlaq tun βnkis~ɕ ru pħaw miq s~ɕqu qs~ɕja ħlħun, ps~ɕʔru qnxan qutux ŋas~ɕal.ana mis~ɕuw qani ɣa βaqun naħa kwara qu s~ɕinllwan lalu na ħoku qani ppraw qnxan na ββnkis~ɕ ma. ħoku maki qu ɣaɣa na tajal maħa.ħoku qani ɣa pɣleŋ maras~ɕ rmaw inluŋan nqu βnkis~ɕ,jan nqu mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨinβliħun s~ɕmjej ɣa s~ɕiki s~ɕʔaras~ɕ naħa ħoku,ħoku qani ɣa s~ɕiki majβnkis~ɕ ru mrʔru qu inluŋan nja ɣiwan nqu pɣleŋ kmajal zjwaw na mus~ɕa s~ɕmjej ru pquzij s~ɕqu tokan te s~ɕjaw βliħun teta βaqun kwara ka qalaŋ maħa njux rima waħan s~ɕmjej ni s~ɕquliq qu laqi kneril ʦ~ʨinŋas~ɕal qani lma. njux ɣalan ħoku ni jutas~ɕ qu ħoku qani ɣi ħja qu pʔaras~ɕ lmos~ɕaj. ***ħoku*********. s~ɕiki maras~ɕ ta ħoku mus~ɕa ta mklħŋan mħkaŋi aj! ɣi s~ɕs~ɕaɣaw ta mqu. !
